pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin source and target configuration to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 16.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.18 to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.0 does not support Java 21; runtime or startup failures will occur.
Build tools relying on these properties will target the wrong JDK version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from spring-boot-starter-test to inherit from parent.
pom.xml.why_exists: Explicit version 2.4.0 conflicts with parent 2.7.18, causing dependency resolution errors.
Older versions may have security vulnerabilities or compatibility issues with newer JDKs.
Older versions may have security vulnerabilities or compatibility issues with newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Externalize bot-integration-spring version to a property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Improves maintainability by centralizing version management.
Required for new functionality or refactoring.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin source and target in profile to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 1.8.
Javadoc generation will fail if source version does not match the JDK.

pom.xml~.general_idea: Reformat the maven-compiler-plugin configuration from a single minified line to a multi-line structure for readability.
Add the bot-builder dependency to the project.
Add the bot-dialogs dependency to the project.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.general_idea: Reorder imports to group Spring and Bot Framework imports logically.
Add missing import for @Primary annotation used in new bean definition.
Add missing imports for Bot Framework state and storage classes.
Define a UserState bean to manage user-specific data persistence.
Define a ConversationState bean to manage conversation-specific data persistence.
Define a primary Storage bean using MemoryStorage for in-memory state persistence.
Inject ConversationState and UserState into the Bot bean to enable state management.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Remove dependency on the third-party ProtonPack library for CompletableFuture collection.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.why_exists: The import `com.codepoetics.protonpack.collectors.CompletableFutures` is removed and its usage `CompletableFutures.toFutureList()` is replaced by standard Java stream operations, indicating a cleanup of external dependencies.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Refactor bot logic from imperative text-matching to a declarative Waterfall Dialog system.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.after:
dialogs.add(new WaterfallDialog("menuDialog", Arrays.asList(menuSteps)));
... return stepContext.prompt("menuPrompt", promptOptions);
